description: 20 c5.2xlarge instances launched by deploy-bot at 2026-01-29T23:15Z, adding ~$360/day in compute spend
Glacier lifecycle transition disabled on prod-data-lake bucket by admin at 2026-02-03T09:15Z, preventing cold-tier offload of ~$180 of stored objects
Log verbosity alarm set to DEBUG level by ops-admin at 2026-02-06T14:30Z, triggering high-frequency metric ingestion and log storage charges
NAT Gateway created by infra-bot at 2026-02-10T18:45Z; all private-subnet traffic now exits through it, incurring per-GB data-processing charges at $0.045/GB
Reserved instance pricing expired; dba-admin modified prod-postgres-01 to on-demand billing at 2026-02-16T22:00Z, tripling the hourly instance cost from $0.48/hr to $1.40/hr
dev-bob raised data-pipeline-processor timeout from 30s to 900s at 2026-02-20T16:10Z; recursive invocation pattern caused each call to run to full timeout, multiplying GB-second charges by ~30x
deploy-bot terminated 4 EC2 instances at 2026-02-23T20:30Z; attached EBS volumes were not deleted on termination, leaving 800 GB of orphaned gp3 volumes accruing $0.08/GB-month storage charges
dev-alice enabled S3 Transfer Acceleration on prod-assets-cdn at 2026-02-26T14:20Z, adding $0.04/GB surcharge on top of standard transfer pricing for all PUT/GET operations
